site.title: LeadHound | Verified Lead Generation
site.description: LeadHound delivers verified leads, targeted data lists, campaign management, and CRM-ready workflows for growth-focused service businesses.

hero.eyebrow: Verified lead generation for serious sales teams
hero.headline: Qualified leads without the chasing, sorting, or guesswork.
hero.body: LeadHound builds managed acquisition funnels, verifies every enquiry, and sends sales-ready opportunities straight into your workflow.

intro.headline: Stop buying noise. Start receiving opportunities.
intro.body: LeadHound combines campaign management, verification, delivery controls, and reporting into one clear lead-to-sale workflow.

features.title: Verified before delivery
features.body: Every enquiry is checked for intent, duplication, and basic data quality before it reaches your team.

features.title: Built around sales capacity
features.body: Set lead caps, control regions, and receive the right volume at the right time.

features.title: Managed by growth operators
features.body: We launch, monitor, and optimise campaigns so your team can focus on contact and conversion.

platform.headline: A cleaner path from click to qualified conversation.
platform.body: Bring campaign performance, lead verification, delivery rules, and reporting into one clear operating system for growth.
bullets: Live delivery into inboxes, CRMs, and notification channels
Campaign tracking with clear volume and quality signals
Targeting across service, finance, property, and B2B verticals

services.headline: Everything you need to keep the pipeline moving.

items.title: Pay-per-lead campaigns
items.body: Fresh enquiries generated through managed acquisition campaigns, filtered and delivered against your sales criteria.

items.title: SMS verified leads
items.body: Reduce wasted calls with an additional verification layer that helps confirm contact details before delivery.

items.title: Targeted reactivation
items.body: Reach prospects who have shown prior intent with custom filters for location, industry, and demographic requirements.

items.title: CRM and alerts
items.body: Route leads into the tools your team already uses, with instant notifications and clear delivery rules.

leadFunnels.headline: Best-practice funnels that turn attention into booked conversations.
leadFunnels.body: Every campaign is built around the same disciplined path: attract the right audience, qualify intent, verify contact details, and deliver leads while interest is fresh.

steps.title: Targeted traffic
steps.body: Campaigns are matched to the channel, region, and intent signals most likely to produce qualified enquiries.

steps.title: Conversion landing page
steps.body: Each funnel uses focused messaging, strong proof, and a clear offer so visitors know exactly what to do next.

steps.title: Smart qualification
steps.body: Forms collect the practical details your sales team needs without adding friction that hurts conversion.

steps.title: Verification and routing
steps.body: Leads are checked, deduplicated, capped by volume, and pushed into your CRM or inbox in real time.

pricing.headline: Lead packages built around your sales motion.
pricing.body: No bloated retainers. Start with the lead type, quality layer, and daily volume that makes sense for your team.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: For teams testing a new vertical or region.

plans.name: Verified Growth
plans.description: For teams that need cleaner volume and delivery control.

plans.name: Managed Scale
plans.description: For established teams ready to expand pipeline.

reviews.headline: Built for businesses that cannot afford messy lead flow.
reviews.body: Cleaner handoffs, fewer dead ends, and a team that understands sales velocity.

items.name: Jeneya Kennett
items.quote: We have been working with LeadHound since launching our finance company and have seen strong, consistent lead flow.

items.name: Mark Ragel
items.quote: The team understands lead quality, volume management, and what sales teams actually need to move quickly.

items.title: SMS verification now rolling across new verticals
How high-intent data unlocks hidden revenue
Save time by routing leads straight to action

items.question: How does LeadHound verify leads?
items.answer: We use layered checks to reduce spam, duplicates, and low-intent enquiries before delivery.

items.question: Can leads go straight into our CRM?
items.answer: Yes. Leads can be delivered to inboxes, CRMs, dashboards, or notification workflows depending on your setup.

items.question: Can we control daily volume?
items.answer: Yes. You can set lead caps and adjust volume based on your team's contact capacity.

cta.headline: Fill your pipeline with cleaner, verified leads.
cta.body: Tell us your target market, sales capacity, and ideal lead type. We will shape a plan around quality, speed, and conversion.

footer.body: LeadHound helps service-based brands generate, verify, and deliver high-intent leads across the full sales process.
